## What

Briefly, what does this PR do?

## Why

The problem it solves / issue it closes. `Closes #…`

## How

Key implementation notes — anything a reviewer should look at first.

## Screenshots / GIF

_Required for any UI change._ Before / after.

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` is clean
- [ ] Added / updated tests for logic changes
- [ ] Focused — one concern per PR
- [ ] No new runtime dependency in `agentic/` (core is `node:*`-only), or discussed in the issue
- [ ] Docs / README updated if behavior changed
